Boarding Life

Home, support, and growth in our boarding community.

The Isaiyana boarding experience is built around safety, structure, and strong relationships for learners away from home.

Explore OverviewFees & Admission

Boarding Overview

Welcome to a vibrant residential school community.

Welcoming Homes

Comfortable boarding houses designed to feel safe, nurturing, and community-focused.

Residential Life

Structured routines help students balance study, recreation, and personal growth.

Campus Traditions

Evenings, weekend activities, and cultural events bring boarding students together.

Dorm Care

Dedicated boys and girls residential houses.

Boys Dorm

Quiet study spaces, shared common areas, and supportive house leadership.

Girls Dorm

Private sections, wellbeing routines, and a warm family atmosphere.

Daily Schedule

Balanced routines for learning and rest.

6:00

Wake-up & devotion

7:00

Breakfast

8:00

Academic lessons

12:30

Lunch & rest

14:30

Activities & clubs

17:30

Study hall

19:30

Dinner & reflection

21:00

Lights out

Rules

A respectful community with clear expectations.

  • Respect the community and school property.
  • Attend daily devotionals and study sessions.
  • Keep dormitories clean and tidy.
  • Share in meal times, chores, and weekend routines.
  • Follow house supervision and safety guidelines.
View Boarding FeesCall Boarding Office
